phases.title: Self-Compliance Hardening — CI Enforcement, Compliance Validator & Protocol Hardening
phases.note: Lifecycle: proposed 2026-07-08 (planner; schema enum has no 'proposed' value, so 'pending' + activation_state was used) -> activated 2026-07-08 on human authorization ('approved. please proceed.', run_state event phase_activated) -> completed 2026-07-08 (run_state event phase_complete). Status/activation_state/current_phase now all reflect the completed, previously-active state; this note superseded the original proposal-time wording, which had gone stale after activation (PR #3 review finding).

phases.title: Communication & User Guide — First-Contact Clarity Remediation & Shipped HTML User Guide
phases.note: Lifecycle: proposed 2026-07-08 (planner) -> activated 2026-07-08 on human authorization ("approved. please proceed.", run_state event phase_activated) -> completed 2026-07-08 (run_state event phase_complete; all 6 features 017-022 through the full contract lifecycle, validator green). Human gates outstanding at close (none executed by the pipeline): v0.3.0 release (MINOR), GitHub Pages publishing for docs/guide/, and human review/merge of the phase/003-communication PR.

phases.title: Durable Enforcement & Dogfooding — Narrative-Truth CI Checks, Vetted Verification Library, E2E Bootstrap Test & Schema Dogfooding
phases.note: Lifecycle: PROPOSED 2026-07-08 by @planner (spec .agent/product_spec_004.md, feature_list_004.json: 8 features 023-030, DAG validated acyclic, original_estimate_lines=1250) -> ACTIVATED 2026-07-08 on human authorization ('approved. please proceed.') -> COMPLETED 2026-07-10 (run_state event phase_complete: all 8 features 023-030 through the full contract lifecycle, validator green SUMMARY: 11 passed, 0 failed; phase PR #15 merged to main). Realized four recommendations: R1 narrative-truth CI checks C9 (path resolution) + C10 (single-source-of-truth consistency); R2 hermetic end-to-end consumer-bootstrap test + CI job; R3 tools/verify_lib.sh vetted verification-helper library + a verification-authoring standard in methodology/02; R4 schema reconciliation (qa_verdict union + new contract_review schema) + C11 dogfood validation of the framework's own .agent/ artifacts, resolving NDEBT-002. NOTE the release-gate drift: the proposal-time note named v0.4.0 as the close gate, but v0.4.0/v0.4.1 (NMF hybrid) and v0.5.0-v0.5.3 were consumed by out-of-band work while this phase executed; the phase's [Unreleased] CHANGELOG content awaits the next MINOR cut (v0.6.0 per run_state). Human gates outstanding at close: the v0.6.0 release cut and GitHub Pages publishing for docs/guide/ (open since phase 003) — recorded, not executed. Status corrected from stale 'in_progress' 2026-07-12 (the manifest was never updated at phase close; run_state, feature_list_004, DEBT.md, and git history all corroborate completion). Forward planning: docs/planning/ROADMAP.md.

phases.title: Ecosystem Engineering Cycle (Framework Side) — Reusable Reconcile/Preflight/Baseline/Audit/Compare Lifecycle, Schemas, Preflight CLI & Framework Dogfood
phases.note: Lifecycle: PROPOSED 2026-07-17 by @planner (spec .agent/product_spec_005.md, feature_list_005.json: 15 features 031-045, DAG validated acyclic — deps all resolve, no cycles, topological order exists — original_estimate_lines=2300) -> ACTIVATED 2026-07-17 on operator authorization. Activation authorization (verbatim): 'approved. expedite.' (remote-control message, 2026-07-17), which accepts NIP-0001 (docs/nips/NIP-0001-ecosystem-engineering-cycle.md, status Accepted) satisfying operator gate H-NIP and makes the ecosystem cycle the plan of record. Scope: FRAMEWORK SIDE ONLY — the accepted programme's framework features (handover F-001..F-015), mapped 1:1 to framework features 031..045 via each feature's handover_feature_ids field, grouped into four PRs: PR-F1=NIP + plan of record (031); PR-F2=ecosystem module protocols + baseline/preflight-verdict/finding schemas + capability routing (032-040); PR-F3=preflight CLI + validator/CI fixtures (041-042); PR-F4=framework dogfood evidence (043-044); plus release preparation (045, HUMAN GATE). Consumer adoption (handover F-016..F-020, targeting nizamiq/nizamiq-strategy) is EXPLICITLY OUT OF SCOPE for this phase and deferred to the successor programme phase, gated on the framework release. status='in_progress' + activation_state='active' reflect the operator-authorized activation (manifest.schema status enum has no 'proposed'/'active' value; the proposed->active decision-lifecycle is carried by activation_state + this note, matching the phase 002/003/004 house pattern). Outstanding human gates (recorded, NOT executed by the pipeline): H-FRAMEWORK-SCOPE (minimum-viable v1 scope-lock), H-DOGFOOD-EXCEPTION (approve any PASS_WITH_EXCEPTIONS framework preflight, feature 043), H-FRAMEWORK-RELEASE (approve version/changelog/tag, feature 045), H-RISK (accept any residual P1 engineering risk). Also inherited-open from prior phases: the v0.6.0 GitHub Release page publication and GitHub Pages publishing for docs/guide/. Forward planning: docs/planning/ROADMAP.md. -> COMPLETED 2026-07-18 (run_state event phase_complete): all 15 planned features 031-045 plus review-response overhead features 046-048 through the full lifecycle; the stack landed on main via the re-landing PR #25 (merge 4833322) after the 2026-07-18 stack collapse (#20 squash-merged with branch deletion auto-closed #21 unmerged; #22-#24 merged branch-to-branch, never reaching main; recovery: reconciliation merge bed7a55, provably lossless, result tree byte-identical to the validated lineage tip 26eb99b). H-FRAMEWORK-RELEASE executed 2026-07-18: operator sign-off (verbatim 'I Sign off release-readiness', recorded at 31f3fff BEFORE the tag per the NDEBT-018 rule) + operator-pushed annotated tag v0.7.0 at 4833322; release.yml auto-published the GitHub Release page (title defect registered as NDEBT-025). Consumer adoption (handover F-016..F-020) remains successor-phase scope, now unblocked by the released tag. Forward planning: docs/planning/ROADMAP.md.

phases.title: Enforcement Closure & Hardening — Debt-Driven Self-Compliance, Consumer-Reality Fixes & the Constitutional-Layer Decision
phases.note: Lifecycle: PROPOSED 2026-07-18 by the post-v0.7.0 planning session on operator direction ('Please action items 1-3', item 3) — spec .agent/product_spec_006.md (status draft, deliberately: the 005 lesson that frontmatter tracks the decision lifecycle), feature_list_006.json (11 features 049-059, DAG validated acyclic, original_estimate_lines 1720). NOT ACTIVATED: per methodology/00_planning.md a phase becomes real only on operator authorization (gate H-PHASE-006); current_phase remains 005-ecosystem-cycle (complete) until that authorization is given, and no feature may enter contract negotiation before it. Scope sourced from ROADMAP Track 2 (the pre-005 candidate scope), Track 3 (the constitutional mechanize-or-descope decision, carried since 2026-07-12), and the open debt register (21 rows at DEBT 0.15.0); NDEBT-025 excluded as remediated pre-phase. Consumer adoption (handover F-016..F-020, nizamiq/nizamiq-strategy) is explicitly NOT this proposal — a separate cross-repository successor programme phase. -> ACTIVATED 2026-07-19 on operator authorization (verbatim: 'Approved. Proceed with the logical next steps.', gate H-PHASE-006; run_state event phase_activated, committed before any feature execution per the NDEBT-018 rule). current_phase advanced to 006-enforcement-closure; product_spec_006 flipped draft -> active (1.1.0) at the same roll. Execution begins with the ungated DAG roots (first: feature 049); mid-phase operator gates H-PAYLOAD-CONTRACT (F-051) and H-CONSTITUTIONAL (F-058) remain recorded, not executed. -> COMPLETED 2026-07-20 (run_state event phase_complete): all 11 features 049-059 landed on main via eleven sequential PRs #28-#38. H-FRAMEWORK-RELEASE executed 2026-07-20 -- operator sign-off via the PR #38 merge (183e468) + operator-pushed annotated tag v0.8.0 at 183e468; release.yml (run 29717579479) published the GitHub Release page from the [0.8.0] CHANGELOG section. Release tier MINOR. original_estimate_lines re-baselined 1720 -> 2300 -> 2600 (both operator-authorized, methodology/00_planning.md Section 9); phase closed at 2833/3380 cumulative. Inherited enforcement-closure debt (NDEBT-004/005/007-024) fully Resolved; one new Low NDEBT-026 (validator C15 coverage-vs-mapping enhancement candidate) surfaced in the PR #38 review and registered Open. Consumer adoption (handover F-016..F-020, nizamiq/nizamiq-strategy) remains a separate successor programme phase, now unblocked by the released tag. Forward planning: docs/planning/ROADMAP.md.

phases.title: Consumer-Adoption Enablement & First External Pilot — Bootstrap-Stage Protocol, H-CONSUMER-UPGRADE Gate & First Non-Self Ecosystem Pilot
phases.note: Lifecycle: PROPOSED 2026-07-20 by the post-Tier-0/Tier-1 planning session (spec .agent/product_spec_007.md status draft; feature_list_007.json: 5 features 060-064, DAG validated acyclic — roots {060}, 060->061->063->064, 060->062 conditional — original_estimate_lines 870). -> ACTIVATED 2026-07-20 on operator authorization (verbatim: 'Authorized to activate now', gate H-PHASE-007; run_state event phase_activated, committed before any feature execution per the NDEBT-018 rule). current_phase advanced 006-enforcement-closure -> 007-consumer-adoption; product_spec_007 flipped draft -> active (1.1.0) at the same roll; scope budget reset (870 est, phase-006 final archived in run_state.phase_006_scope_budget_final). The manifest.schema status enum has no 'active' value, so status='in_progress' + activation_state='active' carry the decision-lifecycle, matching the phase 002-006 house pattern. Scope: author the missing Bootstrap-stage protocol (ecosystem/00_ecosystem_bootstrap.md) + define the reserved gate H-CONSUMER-UPGRADE (framework-internal, executable now — the ungated DAG root feature 060 then 061), then run the first REAL external-consumer pilot (ROADMAP Track 4 / handover F-016..F-020) and prioritise the deferred protocols (04/05/06/08) from real friction rather than speculation. Pilot precondition (features 063-064): operator-authorized access to a consumer repository — the canonical target nizamiq/nizamiq-strategy is a different organization outside this session's scope; the pilot is deferred until consumer-repo sourcing is resolved. Forward planning: docs/planning/ROADMAP.md. -> COMPLETE 2026-07-21. Features 060-061 (framework-internal) landed; the pilot (063) ran against a scratch/throwaway consumer (operator option c — Section 3 consumer-repo question resolved as the scratch path) proving adoption holds (bootstrap+verify+validate --payload 11/11) and surfacing consumer-readiness friction recorded as NDEBT-027..032; feature 064 authored the evidence-prioritized phase-008 candidate scope in ROADMAP. The operator's 2026-07-21 0-to-n project-spectrum design requirement was made first-class in ecosystem/00 (v0.2.0) and captured formally as NIP-0002 (Proposed, awaiting H-NIP) + ADR-004 (Accepted). Conditional feature 062 not run (no brownfield collision; carried as NDEBT-032). Full sweep 15/15. H-NIP EXERCISED 2026-07-21 — operator accepted NIP-0002 ('NIP-0002 is accepted'), SELECTING phase 008 as its realization (selection is not activation: phase 008 still needs product_spec_008 + feature_list_008 + H-PHASE-008). PR #42 opened for the phase-007 branch.

phases.title: 0–n Project Spectrum, Stage 1: Consumer-Readiness — governance-root resolution, provenance-pin anchoring, SHA-pinned bootstrap, brownfield reconciliation, and a proving re-pilot
phases.note: PROPOSED 2026-07-21 (operator 'open phase 008'). Realizes NIP-0002 (The 0–n Project Spectrum, accepted via gate H-NIP) Stage 1 — consumer-readiness, the prerequisite for every larger project count. Planner artifacts: .agent/product_spec_008.md (status draft) + .agent/feature_list_008.json (features 065-069, DAG-validated acyclic, roots {065,068}, original_estimate_lines 1010). Scope: ADR-004 governance-root resolution (NDEBT-027, F-065) + provenance-pin anchoring (NDEBT-028, F-066), bootstrap commit-SHA pinning (NDEBT-033, F-067), GIP Sec 5.1 brownfield reconciliation (NDEBT-032, F-068), then a re-pilot proving the fixed single-project loop + phase close (F-069). NIP-0002 Stages 2-4 (0-case greenfield genesis NDEBT-030, n-case multi-repo tooling + membership registry NDEBT-031, 04/05 coordination protocols, NDEBT-029) are OUT OF SCOPE — carried as phase-009 candidate scope, evidence-gated on F-069's re-pilot. Awaiting activation gate H-PHASE-008; no feature enters contract negotiation before it. current_phase remains 007-consumer-adoption (complete) until activation. Forward planning: docs/planning/ROADMAP.md.
